name: edgar_get_metric
description: Get a specific financial metric (EPS, revenue, net income, etc.) for a company from SEC XBRL filings. Returns last N quarterly or annual records. Use for: numeric analyst queries like AAPL EPS last 4 quarters.

metric.description: Human-readable metric name: revenue, net income, eps, eps diluted, gross profit, operating income, total assets, total debt, cash, operating cash flow, capex, r&d, etc.

periods.description: Number of periods to return (default 4, max 20)
